# Overview — giapha-os

## Tech Stack

| Tầng | Công nghệ | Version |
|------|-----------|---------|
| Framework | Next.js (App Router) | 16.2.6 |
| UI | React | 19.2.6 |
| Language | TypeScript | 5.9.3 |
| Database / Auth | Supabase (PostgreSQL) | @supabase/supabase-js ^2.106 |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | 4.3.0 |
| Visualization | D3 | 7.9.0 |
| Animation | Framer Motion | 12.40.0 |
| Domain lib | lunar-javascript | 1.7.7 |
| Testing | Vitest + Playwright | 3.2.4 / 1.60 |

## Entry Points

| Route | File | Mô tả |
|-------|------|-------|
| `/` | `app/page.tsx` | Landing page |
| `/login` | `app/login/page.tsx` | Auth |
| `/dashboard` | `app/dashboard/page.tsx` | Main dashboard |
| `/dashboard/members` | `app/dashboard/members/page.tsx` | Member list |
| `/dashboard/members/[id]` | `app/dashboard/members/[id]/page.tsx` | Member detail |
| `/dashboard/lineage` | `app/dashboard/lineage/page.tsx` | Lineage management |
| `/dashboard/kinship` | `app/dashboard/kinship/page.tsx` | Kinship finder |

## Module Inventory

| Module | Path | Vai trò |
|--------|------|---------|
| Server Actions | `app/actions/` | data.ts, lineage.ts, member.ts, user.ts |
| Components | `components/` | ~30 React components (FamilyTree, RelationshipManager, LineageManager, etc.) |
| Utils | `utils/` | lineage.ts, csv.ts, gedcom.ts, kinshipHelpers.ts, dateHelpers.ts |
| Types | `types/index.ts` | Person, Relationship, Profile, UserRole |
| Context | `context/` | MemberDetailContent, MemberListContext |
| Hooks | `hooks/` | usePanZoom, useReducedMotion |
| Supabase | `utils/supabase/` | client, server, middleware, queries, storage |

## Commands

```bash
npm run dev       # Development server
npm run build     # Production build
npm run lint      # ESLint
npx vitest run    # Unit tests
npx playwright test  # E2E tests
```
